_comment: A2A AgentCard payload (PDF Section 1, Page 2) for the Weather Forecast Agent. Served from /.well-known/agent.json on the Reasoning Engine's A2A endpoint and ingested by Gemini Enterprise on registration.
name: Weather Forecast Agent
description: Returns current weather conditions for any location using a backed get_weather tool.

extensions.description: Ability to render A2UI components (weather cards, temperature widgets).

skills.name: Weather Forecast Lookup
skills.description: Looks up current weather (temperature, conditions) for a named city or location and returns a natural-language summary.
examples: Tell me the forecast for Miami today.
How hot is it in Phoenix right now?

skills.name: Weather Image Analysis
skills.description: Analyzes an uploaded weather-related image and provides commentary on conditions shown.
examples: What's the weather like in this photo?
What conditions does this image show?
